assumptions.G_is_differentiable: G_ij(k) is differentiable on (0, Lambda] for all i, j
assumptions.indices_are_covariant: i, j are tensor indices in flat Euclidean space, so partial derivatives commute with index operations

application_context.purpose: reorganizes the integrand to separate total derivatives from remainder terms
application_context.boundary_terms: total derivative terms evaluated at k = 0 and k = Lambda may contribute or vanish depending on boundary conditions
